title: The Big Gamble
writer: Octavus Roy Cohen, Walter DeLeon, F. McGrew Willis
actors: William Boyd, James Gleason, Warner Oland
plot: Unable to repay a substantial gambling debt to mob boss North, Alan Beckwith concocts a last-ditch scheme. Allowing North to take out a $100,000 insurance policy on his life, Alan agrees to commit suicide after the mandantory one-...
